items.summary: Make the entire top section of the TaskQueue page sticky. This section includes: the brand header (Kollect Lite logo, user name, user ID, logout button), the tab bar (Queue / Dispute / Profile), the workload filter chips (Workload, Priority, Not Contacted), and the search bar. All four sub-sections must remain fixed at the top of the viewport while the case list below scrolls independently.

Enclose both the animated crosshair logo screen (Splash page) and the static logo/login screen (Login page) inside the existing PhoneMockup component so they render within a phone frame by default. The TaskQueue page and CaseDetail page should remain unaffected and continue to render full-width.
